            has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # bba_strat_bombing_2040 - 2040
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_strat_bombing_2040 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2040 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_strat_bombing_2040 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {

        limit = {

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # iw_medium_airframe - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = bba_medium_aircraft_frame_2010 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_medium_aircraft_frame_2010 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (5 techs) --

# early_naval_bomber
#   year=1917 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# interwars_naval_bomber
#   year=1924 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1917 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1924 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1924 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1917 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_naval_bomber - 1917
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_naval_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1917 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { early_naval_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # naval_bomber2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { naval_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1901 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1901 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # RON_Zepellin_1901 - 1901
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = RON_Zepellin_1901 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1901 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { RON_Zepellin_1901 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (19 techs) --

# early_bomber_1914
#   year=1914 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_bomber
#   year=1916 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_bomber
#   year=1918 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1928 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[jet_engines]

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber_a
#   year=1955 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1928 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1928 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1940 = yes
        }

# -- AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) --

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = bba_strategic_airlifter }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # strategic_airlifter - 1948
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_airlifter }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # chemical_research - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = chemical_research }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { chemical_research = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # RON_Electrical_Engineering - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = RON_Electrical_Engineering }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { RON_Electrical_Engineering = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # RON_19th_Century_Industrial_Techniques - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = RON_19th_Century_Industrial_Techniques }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { RON_19th_Century_Industrial_Techniques = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        # RON_Early_Oil_Drilling - 1900

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

#   year=2050 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# bba_fusion_engine_2055
#   year=2055 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# bba_fusion_engine_2060
#   year=2060 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1915 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1915 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1957 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1957 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1965 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1965 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1995 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1995 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2010 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2025 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2025 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2040 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2040 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2045 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2045 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2050 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2050 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2055 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2055 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2060 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2060 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # RON_Radioactive_Materials - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = RON_Radioactive_Materials }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { RON_Radioactive_Materials = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # radio_detection - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = radio_detection }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            }
            set_technology = { radio_detection = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ROCKETS (83 techs) --

# RON_Early_Rocketry
#   year=1926 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# RON_Pulsoreactors
#   year=1930 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# RON_Integrated_Guidance_System
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets_y1926 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # RON_Early_Rocketry - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = RON_Early_Rocketry }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { RON_Early_Rocketry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # RON_Basic_Light_Field_Gun - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = RON_Basic_Light_Field_Gun }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery_y2020 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # sam_carrier7 - 2020

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sam_carrier7 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            }
            set_technology = { sam_carrier7 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1916 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1916 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # gwtank_chassis_heavy - 1916
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1916 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_tech = NSB_early_tank_engine
                has_tech = NSB_early_tank_gun
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank_chassis_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1910 = yes

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1910 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # NSB_early_tank_engine - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = NSB_early_tank_engine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_tech = ww1_NSB_armoured_car
            }
            set_technology = { NSB_early_tank_engine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # NSB_early_tank_engine - 1910
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = NSB_early_tank_engine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { NSB_early_tank_engine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1943 = yes

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            }

        }
    }

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939 = yes

        if = {
            limit = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis_k = 1 popup = no }

        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # tech_support - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # armored_train_0 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_train_0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { armored_train_0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { electric_train_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # rail_electrification_4 - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rail_electrification_4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { rail_electrification_4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # rail_yard_6 - 2020
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rail_yard_6 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }

        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1899 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1899 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # dnc_armoured_car - 1899
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = dnc_armoured_car }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1899 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { dnc_armoured_car = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # NSB_dnc_armoured_car - 1899
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = NSB_dnc_armoured_car }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1899 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { NSB_dnc_armoured_car = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_armored_car_concepts - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_armored_car_concepts }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { early_armored_car_concepts = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # WW1_tech_maintenance_company - 1900
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = WW1_tech_maintenance_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { WW1_tech_maintenance_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# cw_battle_cruiser0
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# cw_battle_cruiser1
#   year=1948 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# cw_battleship0
#   year=1948 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# cw_battleship1
#   year=1952 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# cw_battleship2
#   year=1956 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1906 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1952 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1952 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1956 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1956 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_dreadnought - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_dreadnought }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_dreadnought = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ww1_battleship0 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_battleship0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        if = {

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1906 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1906 = yes
        }

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1890 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # ww1_destroyer0 - 1890
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ww1_destroyer0 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { ww1_destroyer0 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            set_technology = { mtg_ww1_destroyer1 = 1 popup = no }

# -- NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (15 techs) --

# ww1_heavy_cruiser0
#   year=1890 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ww1_heavy_cruiser1
#   year=1900 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# cw_heavy_cruiser0
#   year=1948 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# cw_heavy_cruiser1
#   year=1952 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# cw_heavy_cruiser2
#   year=1956 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_cruiser1
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_cruiser2
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_cruiser3
#   year=2006 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_cruiser4
#   year=2010 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_cruiser5
#   year=2020 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_cruiser6
#   year=2030 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1948 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1952 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1952 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1956 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1956 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2010 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1890 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1890 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1900 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1900 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
